The '''rosewood blowpipe''' is a [[blowpipe]] that requires 65 [[Ranged]] to wield. It is made with a [[knife]] from two [[rosewood logs]] and a [[squid beak]], requiring 84 [[Fletching]] and granting 200 experience. It is able to shoot up to [[adamant dart]]s. It can store a maximum of 16,383 darts.

As with all blowpipes, the base [[attack speed]] varies; in [[player versus monster]] encounters, its attack speed is '''3''', or equal to darts. During [[player versus player]] combat, its attack speed is '''4''', or equal to a [[Shortbow (weapon)|shortbow]].

If the blowpipe is [[Protect Item|protected]] upon death, all darts will be maintained in the blowpipe when you respawn.

{{Bug|It is currently impossible to use only a [[fletching knife]] to fletch a blowpipe. With both a regular [[knife]] and a fletching knife on the player, the fletching action does get sped up by one tick, however.}}

==Special attack==
[[File:Rapid Burst.gif|250px|thumb|A player performs the rosewood blowpipe's special attack, ''Rapid Burst''.]]
The rosewood blowpipe has a [[special attack]], ''Rapid Burst'', which will shoot two darts in rapid succession, using 25% of a player's special attack energy. Each dart shot has its own accuracy and damage rolls, with accuracy reduced by 20% and damage increased by 10%.

It functions similarly to a budget [[dragon knife]] for enemies with low defence, or against targets on which the player is guaranteed a [[successful hit]].

Ranging and hitpoints experience is granted for the second hit even if the first hit fully depletes the target's hitpoints. The second hit will show as a blue zero damage splat despite being calculated as a hit.

==Trivia==
* The maximum amount of darts that can be held by the blowpipe, which is 16,383, is equivalent to the maximum value that can be represented by 14 bits. This property is shared by the [[toxic blowpipe]], which has 14 bits allocated for storing the ammo count while the rest of the bits in its 32-bit metadata are allocated for dart types and room for potential future additions.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1408149310097723395|date=24 June 2021|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/99494|archivedate=27 June 2021|quote=14 bits were allocated for that part of its data. The other bits were allocated for remembering the dart types, and any potential expansion that might be wanted for it later - it's always awkward when you want to add another feature later but you used up all 32 bits already.}}
